# FiDi Mezzanine

## About
FiDi Mezzanine is Manhattan's premier full-service event venue located at 55 Broadway in New York City's Financial District (zip code: 10006). The venue spans 6,300 square feet across six beautifully designed rooms and accommodates up to 400 guests for standing receptions and 150 guests for seated dinners.

## What Makes FiDi Mezzanine Unique
FiDi Mezzanine offers complete end-to-end event production. Clients do not need to coordinate multiple vendors. Everything from catering and bar service to decor, staging, and entertainment production is handled in-house by the MMEink team. The venue features floor-to-ceiling windows, designer lounge furniture, chandeliers, and bleacher-style seating in a striking industrial-chic setting on one of Manhattan's most iconic blocks.

## Services
- Corporate events, conferences, product launches and company galas
- Wedding ceremonies and wedding receptions
- Private parties and birthday celebrations
- Milestone celebrations and anniversaries
- Film and TV production shoots
- Full in-house catering and bar service
- Event decor, floral and design
- Production, staging and entertainment
- Event coordination and day-of management

## Venue Rooms
1. Main Bar
2. Lobby
3. Reading Room
4. Conference Room
5. Dining Room
6. Meeting Room

## Capacity
- Up to 400 guests for standing receptions
- Up to 150 guests for seated dinners
- 6,300 square feet total

## Contact
Phone: 212-971-5353
Email: info@mmeink.com
Website: https://www.fidimezzanine.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fidimezzanine/

## Location
55 Broadway, New York, NY 10006
Neighborhood: Financial District (FiDi), Lower Manhattan
Nearby landmarks: Wall Street, New York Stock Exchange, Bowling Green, Battery Park
Nearby subway: Bowling Green (4/5), Wall Street (2/3/4/5), Rector Street (1/R)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How many people can FiDi Mezzanine accommodate?
A: FiDi Mezzanine accommodates up to 400 guests for standing receptions and 150 guests for seated dinners across 6,300 square feet.

Q: What types of events does FiDi Mezzanine host?
A: FiDi Mezzanine hosts corporate events, conferences, product launches, weddings, private parties, birthday celebrations, milestone anniversaries, and film and TV productions.

Q: Where is FiDi Mezzanine located?
A: FiDi Mezzanine is at 55 Broadway, New York, NY 10006 in Manhattan's Financial District, steps from Wall Street.

Q: Does FiDi Mezzanine provide catering and bar service?
A: Yes. FiDi Mezzanine provides full in-house catering, bar service, decor, staging, and event production. All services are managed by the MMEink team.

Q: How do I book FiDi Mezzanine for an event?
A: Contact the FiDi Mezzanine team by phone at 212-971-5353 or by email at info@mmeink.com to discuss availability and pricing for your event.

Q: Is FiDi Mezzanine available for corporate events?
A: Yes. FiDi Mezzanine is one of Manhattan's top corporate event venues, offering flexible spaces for conferences, product launches, team events, and corporate galas in the Financial District.

Q: Is FiDi Mezzanine a wedding venue?
A: Yes. FiDi Mezzanine offers full-service wedding packages including ceremony space, reception, catering, bar, decor, and event coordination for up to 400 guests in New York City.
